Singapore

The biggest story from Singapore this week is PM Lawrence Wong's May Day Rally speech on Friday
He was candid about what's coming вЂ” the Iran crisis and US blockades on Iranian ports are already slowing growth and pushing inflation higher
But the headline pledge was clear: Singapore will protect every worker, even if it can't protect every job
